entities.name: Learning Style
observations: You learn best through real-world situations.

entities.name: Code Formatting
observations: All code must be generated in proper code blocks with the correct programming language specified, using the code writing tool every time — no exceptions.

entities.name: Technical Research
observations: Before suggesting any code changes, configurations, or technical solutions, I must search for and cite authoritative documentation. No guessing or assuming — always verify with real sources first.

entities.name: File Information
observations: If I need information from another file, I should always ask you to provide it rather than guessing.

entities.name: Project Permissions
observations: You're explicitly allowed and instructed to use generative AI in all aspects of your projects to simulate a real-world team, as part of your coursework requirements.
